# PHP Dependency Injection Benchmark

This repository benchmarks different dependency injection containers.

## Test Results

Results from the latest automated run of the Dockerized benchmarks
(triggered on pushes to main and a monthly schedule):

```
### laravel
run 0: 0.54207587242126 seconds per 10000
run 1: 0.54342794418335 seconds per 10000
run 2: 0.54283595085144 seconds per 10000

run 4: 0.54433703422546 seconds per 10000
```

## Summary

| Container | Average | Minimum | Maximum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| laravel | 0.54514927864075 | 0.54274916648865 | 0.55101013183594 |
| nette-di | 0.0034111499786377 | 0.0032849311828613 | 0.0034959316253662 |

| pimple | 0.069382190704346 | 0.06910514831543 | 0.069763898849487 |
| quickly-configured | 0.0040189743041992 | 0.0037260055541992 | 0.0042970180511475 |
| quickly-reflection | 0.0038427352905273 | 0.0037810802459717 | 0.0038979053497314 |
